idea-plugin.name: EasyAgent
idea-plugin.description:
EasyAgent — AI Coding Assistant for IntelliJ IDEA

Aggregate Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex CLI tools into one unified IDE experience.

🎯 AI Chat

  • Connect Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex simultaneously
  • Browse and manage local CLI session history
  • Real-time streaming of thinking, tool calls, and responses
  • @ file references, editor selection references, image paste
  • Slash commands: /new, /compact, /init
  • View AI file changes as diff and one-click rollback
  • Auto-detect CLI paths with manual override

📋 Plan & Kanban

  • Create plans and let AI auto-split into executable tasks
  • Kanban board: Pending / Running / Completed / Failed columns
  • Drag & drop across columns to change status, reorder within columns
  • Concurrent task execution with configurable parallelism
  • Auto-start mode or manual control, stop anytime
  • Retry completed/failed tasks (reuses session context)
  • Auto-generated execution overview after each task

⚙️ Settings

  • CLI tool configuration (API Key, model, command path)
  • MCP service management
  • AI Skills management

Supported CLI Tools

Claude CodeAnthropic official CLInpm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
OpenCodeOpen-source terminal AInpm i -g opencode
CodexOpenAI official CLInpm i -g @openai/codex

Requirements: JDK 17+, IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1+, at least one supported CLI tool installed.

action.description: Insert the current editor file or selection into EasyAgent
Insert selected files into EasyAgent as references
